string.text: Use Mousewheel (Disables keybind settings below if enabled!)
Uses mousewheel input instead for magnifier switching (complies with 'mouse_wheel_invert_zoom' if it is enabled)
Disables magnifier switch on mousewheel when not aiming
Shortcut for the 'mouse_wheel_change_weapon' console command and setting from modded exes, added for convenience

Will modify normal key behaviour when set to Sight Aim Mode Toggle key, allowing it to be used when the magnifier cannot be switched, or when the specific key combination and input mode for magnifier switching are not performed
Switching while aiming down sights maintains ADS (for ADS toggle mode)
Play a sound effect on magnifier mode switch
